name: quantpilot
description: QuantPilot core console for quantitative research and execution

scripts.test:web: vitest run --config apps/web/vite.config.ts apps/web/src/modules/console/execution-collection-configs.test.ts apps/web/src/modules/console/execution-inspection-configs.test.ts apps/web/src/modules/console/execution-operations.test.ts apps/web/src/modules/console/execution-panels.test.tsx apps/web/src/modules/research/research-panels.test.tsx apps/web/src/modules/research/research-navigation.test.ts apps/web/src/modules/permissions/permissionCopy.test.ts apps/web/src/pages/research-pages.test.tsx apps/web/src/pages/settings-page.test.tsx apps/web/src/pages/ui-workflow-polish.test.tsx apps/web/src/modules/risk/risk-workbench.test.tsx apps/web/src/app/styles/style.test.ts apps/web/src/store/trading-system/TradingSystemProvider.test.tsx --environment node
scripts.verify: npm run check:workspaces && npm run check:lockfile && npm run check:no-js-source && npm run check:no-root-artifacts && npm run check:runtime-env && npm run lint && npm run test:engine && npm run test:api && npm run test:web && npm run typecheck && npm run build
